sourceRef.citation: B. Green, Open Problems in Mathematics

statement.latex:
The maximum number of $\lbrace 0,1,3 \rbrace$ affine translates that a set of size $n$ can
contain.
-/
noncomputable def max013AffineTranslates (n : ℕ) : ℕ :=
  sSup { k |
    ∃ A : Finset ℤ,
      A.card = n ∧
      -- Iterate over (x,y) = (a, a + d) in A × A (x ≠ y), and check if a + 3d = x + 3(y - x) ∈ A
      k = ((A ×ˢ A).filter (fun (x, y) ↦ x ≠ y ∧ x + 3 * (y - x) ∈ A)).card
  }

/--
If $A$

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: heuristic match on statement; I_INFINITE_SEARCH type
reiTyping.rationale: 型=無限探索空間, D-FUMT₈=NEITHER; 形式化=medium (sorry=4)
